content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – Model for “contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_17”
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_17

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types – domain concepts that appear in the NDA
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party =
    | PJM(unit)
    | TransmissionOwner(unit)
    | OtherParty(string)

type ConfidentialInformation = {
    owner: Party,
    marked_confidential: bool,
    used_for_transmission_functions: bool
}

type ReviewingRepresentative = {
    name: string,
    title: string,
    party: Party,
    has_certificate: bool,
          has_competitive_duties: bool,
    is_employed: bool
}

type NonDisclosureCertificate = {
    signed_by: ReviewingRepresentative,
    date: string
}

type Note = {
    content: string,
    is_copy: bool,
    created_by: ReviewingRepresentative
}

type ThirdPartyRequest = {
    requestor: string,
    purpose: string,
    legal_basis: bool,
    prior_written_approval: bool
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – stable public objects that can be aligned across modules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity party: Party
entity confidential_information: ConfidentialInformation
entity reviewing_representative: ReviewingRepresentative
entity non_disclosure_certificate: NonDisclosureCertificate
entity note: Note
entity third_party_request: ThirdPartyRequest

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – normative requirements (deontic modality + LTLf)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.2 – Access to Confidential Information requires a signed certificate
rule O access_requires_certificate:
    reviewing_representative.has_certificate always

@ Clause 2.2 – Confidential Information may be used only for Transmission Functions
rule O only_use_for_transmission_functions:
    confidential_information.used_for_transmission_functions always

@ Clause 2.2 – A Reviewing Representative may make a copy (Note) of Confidential
# Information only when the Representative holds a certificate and has no
# competitive duties.
rule O allowed_copy:
    reviewing_representative.has_certificate and
    not reviewing_representative.has_competitive_duties and
    note.is_copy and
    note.created_by = reviewing_representative always

@ Clause 2.2 – Prohibit copying without a certificate
rule F prohibited_copy_without_certificate:
    not reviewing_representative.has_certificate and
    note.is_copy always

@ Clause 2.2 – Prohibit copying when the Representative has competitive duties
rule F prohibited_copy_if_competitive:
    reviewing_representative.has_competitive_duties and
    note.is_copy always

@ Clause 2.2 – Disclosure to a third party is forbidden without prior written
# approval from the Disclosing Party
rule F disclose_to_third_party_without_approval:
    not third_party_request.prior_written_approval always
```
